title: Edge AI Smart Agriculture System
description: Build an AI-based system using Jetson Nano for precision agriculture monitoring, soil health inspection, and pest detection on crops.

epics.title: Jetson Nano AI Model Training
epics.description: Train pest detection and plant health classification models using PyTorch.

epics.title: Hardware Integration & Sensor Setup
epics.description: Integrate soil sensors, camera modules, and power systems with Jetson Nano.

epics.title: Cloud Monitoring Dashboard
epics.description: Build a web-based dashboard for farmers to see analytics and alerts in real-time.

reminders.subject: Reminder: Project Edge AI Smart Agriculture System Awaiting Allocation
reminders.body: The B2B proposal "Edge AI Smart Agriculture System" from NVIDIA is pending review. Please assign it to a Spoke.

reminders.subject: New Project Assigned: Edge AI Smart Agriculture System
reminders.body:

Best regards,
Apni Leap Moderator Portal

title: Automotive VLSI Controller Chip
description: Design and verify a micro-controller unit (MCU) for dashboard telemetry and advanced sensor fusion in electric vehicles.

epics.title: MCU Design & Specification
epics.description: Specify instruction set architecture and create RTL design in Verilog.

epics.title: Telemetry Subsystem Simulation
epics.description: Simulate and verify the CAN bus communication and dashboard telemetry module.

epics.title: Sensor Fusion Verification
epics.description: Perform formal verification of sensor fusion algorithms under critical latency constraints.

reminders.subject: New Project Allocation: Automotive VLSI Controller Chip

title: Cloud-Native Health Tracking API
description: Develop a secure, high-throughput FHIR-compliant API for sharing electronic medical records seamlessly between clinics and hospitals.

epics.title: FHIR Schema Implementation
epics.description: Define and implement medical record schemas adhering strictly to FHIR guidelines.

epics.title: OAuth2 & HIPAA Security Compliance
epics.description: Build end-to-end encryption and audit logging for HIPAA certification.

epics.title: High-Throughput Load Testing
epics.description: Verify API load handling with simulated request traffic of 10k requests/min.

reminders.subject: Reminder: Project Cloud-Native Health Tracking API Awaiting Allocation
reminders.body: The B2B proposal "Cloud-Native Health Tracking API" from Google is pending review. Please assign it to a Spoke.
